The '''Centrans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that hailed from [[Erilnar]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of their home territory, the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]. Their civilization were descended from [[Human/Legends|human]] setters, and partitioned into a separate race due to Erilnar unusual geography and harsh environment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]''
